actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 1566218463, script GUID: 7e860543c4b7344fba986977af52cbaf) attached to Board is PlatformMovement. It handles OnCollisionEnter and CompareTag('Gems'). Since physics collision may not occur (no Rigidbody on Board or Gems), manually invoke getFiftyPoints to simulate a collision from Gems PrefabInstance id 111434455. BoxCollider (id: 1566218464) is present on Board, enabling Trigger interaction. Expected: gemsChildUI enabled; gemsValueUI shows 'Score:10'.
Simulate second Gems collision from PrefabInstance id 1163394800 (Tag 'Gems') to cover CompareTag path. Expected: gemsChildUI enabled; gemsValueUI shows 'Score:20'.
Simulate third Gems collision from PrefabInstance id 701805947 (Tag 'Gems'). Expected: gemsChildUI enabled; gemsValueUI shows 'Score:30'.
Simulate fourth Gems collision from PrefabInstance id 973355952 (Tag 'Gems'). Expected: gemsChildUI enabled; gemsValueUI shows 'Score:40'.
Simulate fifth Gems collision from PrefabInstance id 984890190 (Tag 'Gems') to reach the threshold. Expected: gemsChildUI enabled; gemsValueUI shows 'Score:50' and congratulationsUI enabled.
